author: Mechanism
text:
AUDIT VERDICT (Mechanism): the interim plugin-config split (plugins MAP on the code branch in config.json, config FILES on the tracker branch) is STRUCTURALLY COHERENT for a fresh post-bl-8a9a repo. Verified empirically against a debug build of main 87fdd38 in a federated topology (code repo + dedicated bare hub):

WORKS:
- bl init writes .gitignore with .balls/state-repo + .balls/plugins; .balls/plugins is a symlink into the state checkout from the start.
- bl plugin enable writes the config file into .balls/state-repo/.balls/plugins and commit_change commits it to the tracker branch; bl sync pushes it to the hub.
- bl plugin disable removes the map entry, keeps the file; commit_change is a clean no-op.
- Fresh git clone of the code repo + bl prime: state-repo materializes from the hub, the .balls/plugins symlink inherits the plugin config files. config.json (with the map) rides the code branch; the files do NOT.
- Plugin auth resolves to .balls/local/plugins/<name> (gitignored, per-workspace, never on the tracker) -- confirmed via fake-plugin argv.
- No contradiction with the future project.json ball (bl-e609, in progress): the files are already where bl-e609 wants them; bl-e609 only needs to move the MAP from config.json to project.json and repoint effective_config_path at the project.json symlink.

TWO CONCRETE BUGS FILED:
- bl-1d81 (p2): bl plugin enable writes a config_file the plugin runtime cannot resolve -- enable treats config_file as .balls/plugins-relative, Plugin::resolve treats it as root-relative; no input yields a working entry, and re-running enable corrupts a correct hand-config. Pre-existing in bl-32e5, not bl-8a9a.
- bl-de57 (p2): legacy repos with committed .balls/plugins/* on the code branch are not cleanly migrated -- absorb_plugins_dir migrates the filesystem but not the code-branch git index, and an existing repo's .gitignore never gains the new runtime paths. The dogfooded balls repo is exactly this case; overlaps bl-dc2b.

Both are filed as follow-ups; neither blocks the split being coherent. bl-b0b9 closes conformant.
